summary: Canonical drift resolved without mutation: #39555 is already closed and has a hydrated replacement path in open PR #73976. #73976 remains the canonical repair PR for the per-keyword hybrid FTS bug; #48112 stays open as related but distinct hybrid fallback scoring work.

actions.reason: The representative canonical hint is obsolete because #39555 is already closed; keep it as historical superseded evidence and use hydrated open replacement #73976 as the canonical path.
#73976 is the best live canonical path for the #39484/#39555 per-keyword hybrid FTS bug, but it is not merge-ready in this dedupe-only job.
#48112 belongs to the same hybrid memory-search family but is not the same root cause as #73976; keep it open as related follow-up work.
